message.content:
Explore the UI/UX components of this modular apartment planner webapp. I need to understand:

1. All UI components in src/ui/ - read every file there (Toolbar, Sidebar, PropertiesPanel, InputField, Modal, etc.)
2. All CSS Module files (*.module.css) across the entire project
3. The main App.jsx layout component
4. Any global CSS or theme files
5. The SvgCanvas component and its styling

Read the FULL contents of each file. I need to see the exact current styling, class names, colors, layout structure, button designs, fonts, spacing - everything visual.

Be very thorough - read every .jsx and .css file in src/ui/, src/app/, and src/renderers/ that relates to visual presentation.

content.text: I'll conduct a thorough exploration of the UI/UX components. Let me start by identifying all the relevant files and then reading them systematically.

content.text: Let me read sections of the PropertiesPanel:

Perfect! I now have comprehensive information about all the UI/UX components. Let me create a detailed summary of my findings:

## UI/UX Components Exploration Report

I've thoroughly examined all the UI and styling components of this modular apartment planner webapp. Here's the complete breakdown:

### 1. GLOBAL STYLING & THEME

**File: `src/styles/variables.css`**
- **Color Palette:**
  - Background: `#FAFAF8` (off-white)
  - Wall fill: `#2D3748` (dark gray), stroke: `#1A202C`
  - Grid: minor `#E4E7EC`, major `#CDD5DF` (light grays)
  - Selection highlight: `#0D7C66` (teal/green accent)
  - Text: primary `#1A1D23`, secondary `#5F6470`, tertiary `#9CA3AF`
  - Panels: `#F3F3F0` (light gray), elevated: `#FFFFFF`
  - Borders: `#D9D9D4`, subtle: `rgba(0,0,0,0.06)`
  - Danger: `#DC2626` (red)

- **Layout Dimensions:**
  - Toolbar height: `52px`
  - Sidebar width: `260px`
  - Properties panel width: `280px`

- **Typography:**
  - UI font: `'DM Sans'`, fallback: system-ui
  - Blueprint/monospace: `'JetBrains Mono'`, fallback: `'Courier New'`

- **Spacing Scale:** 2px, 4px, 8px, 12px, 16px, 24px

- **Radii:** 5px (small), 8px (medium), 12px (large)

- **Shadows:** 
  - sm: `0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)`
  - md: `0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)`
  - lg: `0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)`
  - overlay: `0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.16)`

- **Transitions:** `cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)` with 0.1s and 0.2s durations

**File: `src/styles/global.css`**
- Custom scrollbars: 6px width, dark rgba(0,0,0,0.15) with 0.25 on hover
- Focus rings: 2px solid accent color
- Input focus state adds 2px rgba accent-subtle box-shadow
- Modal animations: `modalOverlayIn` (fade), `modalDialogIn` (scale + translate), `fadeInUp`, `pulse`

**File: `src/styles/reset.css`**
- Full reset: border-box sizing, zero margins/padding on all elements
- Buttons: no border, no background, cursor: pointer, inherit font/color
- Inputs/selects: inherit font/color
- Lists: no list-style

### 2. APP LAYOUT

**File: `src/app/App.module.css`**
- **Main layout:** CSS Grid with 3 columns (sidebar | canvas | properties) and 2 rows (toolbar | content)
- Grid template areas for clean layout management
- Sidebar: auto-scrolls, min-height 0 for proper flex overflow
- Canvas: central area with inset shadow (1px dark on sides)
- Properties: right panel, also scrollable
- **Model workspace:** secondary grid with 2 columns (canvas | preview) with ratio `minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(300px, 28vw)`
- Preview fallback shows gradient background: `linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.72), rgba(243,243,240,0.92))`
- **Responsive:** At max-width 1200px, preview moves below canvas in 2-row layout

### 3. TOOLBAR COMPONENT

**File: `src/ui/Toolbar.jsx` & `Toolbar.module.css`**

**Structure:**
- Flexbox row, 52px height, light gray background with bottom border
- Groups separated by 1px subtle dividers

**Button Types:**

1. **Standard Icon Button (.btn):**
   - 34x34px, flex centered
   - Hover: `rgba(0,0,0,0.06)` background
   - Active: `scale(0.97)`
   - Disabled: 0.45 opacity, no hover effect
   - SVG icons: 18x18px

2. **Save Button (.saveBtn):**
   - Special: has pulsing dot indicator when dirty
   - Position absolute top-right 5px
   - 6x6px circle, accent color
   - Animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite (opacity 1 → 0.4 → 1)

3. **Segmented Pill Control (.segmentedGroup/.segmentedBtn):**
   - Background: `var(--color-segment-bg)` (subtle)
   - Individual buttons: 28px height, 10px padding
   - Border radius: `calc(var(--radius-md) - 2px)`
   - Text: secondary gray, 11px, 500 weight
   - Active state (.segmentedBtnActive): white background, dark text, 600 weight, adds shadow
   - Hover: lightens background slightly

4. **Tool Palette (.toolPaletteBtn / .toolPaletteBtnActive):**
   - 32x32px square buttons with 1px gaps
   - Secondary text color, hover brightens
   - Active: accent-subtle background with accent color text

5. **Fixture Palette:**
   - Label: 10px uppercase, secondary gray, right margin 4px
   - Same button styling as tool palette

6. **Toggle Buttons (.toggleBtn):**
   - Start at 0.6 opacity
   - Active (.toggleActive): 1 opacity, accent-subtle background, accent text

**Icons:** All are 18x18px SVG components, stroke-based with stroke properties: 1.5px stroke-width, round linecaps/joins

### 4. SIDEBAR COMPONENT

**File: `src/ui/Sidebar.jsx` & `Sidebar.module.css`**

**Layout:**
- Light gray background, right border, vertical flex
- Padding: 16px (space-lg) with 16px gaps between sections

**Section Headers (.section, .sectionHeader):**
- 11px uppercase title, 600 weight, 0.06em letter-spacing, secondary gray
- Chevron icon (14x14px) with -90deg rotation when collapsed
- Bottom border divider
- Hover background: `rgba(0,0,0,0.03)`
- Count badge: 11px, secondary gray text, `rgba(0,0,0,0.04)` background, 6px horizontal padding, 18px line-height

**Project Name Input:**
- 28px height, 8px horizontal padding
- 1px border (color-border), radius 5px
- Focus: border becomes accent color, adds 2px accent-subtle shadow

**Items (.item / .itemSelected):**
- 12px text, clickable, left border (2px transparent)
- Hover: `rgba(0,0,0,0.04)` background, border becomes visible
- Selected: accent-subtle background, accent text, 500 weight, left border accent colored

**Floor Cards (.floorCard):**
- Border: 1px, radius 8px
- Background: `#EFEFEC`, hover → `#E8E8E4`
- Active border: accent colored, background accent-subtle
- Flex layout: main button (flex: 1) + action buttons (hidden until hover)
- Floor name: 12px 500 weight
- Floor meta: 10px secondary gray
- Action buttons appear on hover: 26x26px, secondary gray, hover adds background + primary text color
- Danger action: hover → danger-ghost-bg-hover with danger color

**Context Header (.contextHeader):**
- Sticky positioned (top: 0, z-index: 2)
- Accent colored text, backdrop blur 6px
- Semi-transparent background: `rgba(243,243,240,0.92)`

### 5. PROPERTIES PANEL COMPONENT

**File: `src/ui/PropertiesPanel.jsx` & `PropertiesPanel.module.css`**

**Layout:**
- Light gray background, left border, vertical scroll
- Padding: 16px, gaps: 12px between sections

**Titles & Subtitles:**
- Title: 14px 600 weight
- Subtitle: 11px uppercase, secondary gray, 0.5px letter-spacing, top border divider, padding/margin

**Unit Toggle (Segmented Control):**
- Same styling as toolbar pill: `var(--color-segment-bg)` background, 2px padding, 24px height buttons
- Width: fit-content

**Input Fields:**
- Label: 80px wide, 12px, secondary gray
- Input wrapper: flex row with 4px gap, flex: 1
- Input height: 28px, 8px horizontal padding
- Border: 1px color-border, radius 5px
- Focus: accent border + 2px accent-subtle shadow
- Number inputs: use blueprint monospace font
- Read-only: panel-bg with secondary gray text
- Suffix: 10px, tertiary gray, blueprint font

**Color Field:**
- Flex row with 8px gap
- Color picker: 44x32px, 2px padding, elevated background
- Hex input: 72x28px, monospace font
- Same focus treatment

**Buttons:**

1. **.deleteBtn:**
   - 30px height, danger text color
   - Border: 1px danger-ghost-border
   - Background: transparent
   - Hover: danger-ghost-bg-hover
   - Active: scale(0.97)
   - Disabled: 0.6 opacity

2. **.actionBtn:**
   - 30px height, accent text color
   - Border: 1px rgba(13,124,102,0.25)
   - Hover: accent-subtle background
   - Margin: 8px top/bottom

3. **.exportMenuTrigger:**
   - Full width, accent-text, border with 0.25 opacity accent
   - Chevron indicator (▾/▴)
   - Dropdown list absolutely positioned below with shadow

### 6. MODAL COMPONENT

**File: `src/ui/Modal.jsx` & `Modal.module.css`**

**Overlay (.overlay):**
- Fixed fullscreen, z-index 1000
- Background: `rgba(10,12,15,0.45)` (dark semi-transparent)
- Backdrop filter: `blur(4px)`
- Animation: `modalOverlayIn` 0.2s ease

**Dialog (.dialog):**
- Min width 360px, max 480px
- Background: `#FAFAF8` (panel bg)
- Border: 1px color-border
- Border radius: 12px (large)
- Shadow: overlay shadow
- Animation: `modalDialogIn` 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)

**Header:**
- Flex row with space-between, 16px padding top/bottom, 24px padding left/right
- Border bottom: 1px color-border
- Title: 16px 600 weight

**Close Button:**
- 28px square, 5px border-radius
- Icon: 16x16px
- Hover: `rgba(0,0,0,0.06)` background + primary gray

**Body:**
- Padding: 24px

**Modal Buttons:**

1. **.modalBtn:**
   - Inline-flex, 8px vertical / 14px horizontal padding
   - Height auto, 12px 600 weight
   - Border: 1px color-border
   - Background: elevated white
   - Hover: `rgba(0,0,0,0.04)` background

2. **.modalBtnDanger:**
   - Inherits modalBtn
   - Border: danger-ghost-border
   - Background: transparent
   - Text: danger color
   - Hover: danger-ghost-bg-hover

**Modal Card (.modalCard):**
- Flex column, 10px gap, 12px padding
- Border: 1px color-border, radius 8px
- Background: elevated white
- Title: 13px 600 weight
- Description: 12px secondary gray, 1.4 line-height

### 7. INPUT FIELD COMPONENT

**File: `src/ui/InputField.jsx` & `InputField.module.css`**

**Field Container:**
- Flex row, 8px gap, margin-bottom 6px

**Label:**
- 80px flex basis
- 12px secondary gray

**Input Wrapper:**
- Flex row, 4px gap, flex: 1
- Contains input + optional suffix

**Input Styling:**
- Flex: 1, min-width: 0
- Height: 28px, 8px horizontal padding
- Border: 1px color-border, radius 5px
- Font: 12px
- Background: elevated white
- Focus: accent border + 2px accent-subtle shadow
- Number variant: blueprint monospace font
- Read-only variant: panel-bg with secondary gray text

**Suffix:**
- 10px tertiary gray, blueprint font

### 8. SVG CANVAS & RENDERING

**File: `src/renderers/SvgCanvas.jsx` & `SvgCanvas.module.css`**

**Canvas Container (.canvasContainer):**
- 100% width/height, overflow hidden, relative position
- Background: `#FAFAF8` (light page color)

**SVG Element (.svg):**
- 100% width/height, display block
- Uses `transform="translate(panX, panY) scale(zoom)"` for viewport control
- Cursor changes based on tool state

**Status Bar (.statusBar):**
- Absolute bottom: 0, left-right: 0
- Height: 26px
- Light gray background, top border
- Inset shadow: `inset 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.03)`
- Flex row, 24px gap, 11px font size (blueprint monospace)
- Secondary gray text
- User-select: none

**Expand Button (.expandBtn):**
- Absolute positioning: bottom 32px, right 8px
- 28x28px, flex centered
- Border: 1px color-border, radius 5px
- Background: elevated white
- Initial opacity: 0.7, hover: 1
- Icon: 14x14px

**Status Message Animation:**
- Inherits fadeInUp animation
- Accent color text
- Font weight 500
- Pushed right with margin-left: auto

### KEY VISUAL PATTERNS

1. **Focus States:** All interactive inputs use accent color border + 2px accent-subtle shadow
2. **Hover Effects:** Subtle background shift to `rgba(0,0,0,0.06)` or similar
3. **Disabled State:** 0.45-0.6 opacity, cursor not-allowed
4. **Active/Selected:** Accent-subtle background with accent text color
5. **Animations:** Smooth 0.2s transitions for background/color/border, scale-down on active
6. **Spacing:** Consistent use of design token spacing (8px, 12px, 16px)
7. **Scrollbars:** Thin, subtle, only show track on hover
8. **Borders:** Subtle 1px dividers using color-border or border-subtle

### FILE LOCATIONS - ABSOLUTE PATHS

- `/src/styles/reset.css` - Element reset rules
- `/src/styles/global.css` - Global animations & focus behavior
- `/src/styles/variables.css` - Design tokens (colors, spacing, typography)
- `/src/app/App.jsx` - Main layout component
- `/src/app/App.module.css` - Grid-based layout, toolbar/sidebar/canvas/properties
- `/src/ui/Toolbar.jsx` - Icon buttons, view mode control, tool palette
- `/src/ui/Toolbar.module.css` - Toolbar styling (groups, pills, toggles)
- `/src/ui/ToolbarIcons.jsx` - SVG icon components (20x20 viewBox)
- `/src/ui/Sidebar.jsx` - Project/floors/sheets/objects hierarchy
- `/src/ui/Sidebar.module.css` - Section styling, floor cards, item selection
- `/src/ui/PropertiesPanel.jsx` - Object editing forms (walls, doors, rooms, etc.)
- `/src/ui/PropertiesPanel.module.css` - Form field styling, buttons, color controls
- `/src/ui/InputField.jsx` - Reusable input wrapper component
- `/src/ui/InputField.module.css` - Label + input + suffix layout
- `/src/ui/Modal.jsx` - Modal dialog overlay component
- `/src/ui/Modal.module.css` - Modal styling, animations, buttons
- `/src/renderers/SvgCanvas.jsx` - Main drawing canvas with tool integration
- `/src/renderers/SvgCanvas.module.css` - Canvas, status bar, expand button
